![Management HQS Quantum Simulations](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5f34fa00fe2696063683642a/e96dbd75-04fe-40b9-a31a-dd8ccdfbd21b/Management1.jpg)
# About HQS
### _We develop software solutions that accelerate innovation in science and industry._
HQS provides software for material scientists in the chemical industry and academia that incorporates sophisticated quantum-level models of the properties of molecules and materials, giving researchers the deeper insights they need to identify the perfect solution.
[ Learn more about our Solutions ](https://quantumsimulations.de/solutions)
## Our Mission: Powering Tomorrow's Solutions
Our mission is to provide software that revolutionizes research to accelerate and enable breakthrough developments in various industries. 
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5f34fa00fe2696063683642a/1601647412536-I4WADAXUG9L5F5EO5FJE/goal_white_framed.png)
## Our Vision: Industry's Quantum Revolution
Our vision is to establish quantum mechanical applications in industry and to realize optimized application-oriented quantum computing. 
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5f34fa00fe2696063683642a/1601647843553-FWZPYKZ0BLP3MPKMRPAI/vision_white_framed.png)
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5f34fa00fe2696063683642a/6ef52e34-8139-4aaf-b953-8cffc84ed7dc/roadmap.jpg)
# HQS Roadmap
## Long term expectations in quantum computing
#### HQS is ideally positioned to find the first valuable use cases for quantum computers
### **2025**
#### Focus on academic NMR problems
First quantum computer applications with 50 qubits in academia
### **2026**
#### Specialized NMR problems in industry are addressed
Initial quantum advantage for the pharma sector
### **2027**
#### Expansion to medical research and applications beyond NMR
Industry-specific problems benefit from quantum computing
### **2028**
#### First use cases in med-tech diagnostics
Quantum computers provide advantages in new fields
### **2029**
#### Quantum machine learning (QML) is used in diagnostics
Advanced quantum solutions adopted in med-tech
## **Our Story and the M** inds Behi**nd HQS**
![Management HQS](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5f34fa00fe2696063683642a/8a11a224-b287-41b8-86ef-8e3322a81f27/management3.jpg)
Quantum technology harbors enormous potential for industry, especially in materials development. However, in the current NISQ era, fully tapping into this potential remains a challenge. But four physicists from Karlsruher Institute of Technology (KIT) saw an opportunity to convert this potential. Thus, HQS was born.
![Team - Meeting HQS Quantum Simulations](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5f34fa00fe2696063683642a/a4401897-f806-4aeb-bfff-cedb1fd6119f/meeting1.jpg)
[ See our current Team ](https://quantumsimulations.de/unser-team)
Timeline
  * ## HQSpectrum Release
HQS launched the full version of [HQSpectrum](https://hqspectrum.cloud.quantumsimulations.de). [Read more](https://quantumsimulations.de/news/hqspectrum-full-release)
  * ## 2025
[EIC Transition grant awarded for HQS-NextNMR](https://quantumsimulations.de/news/hqs-quantum-simulations-receives-funding-from-the-european-innovation-council-transition-program) to advance next‑gen NMR prediction and analysis toward personalized medicine.
[HQSpectrum Trial](https://quantumsimulations.de/hqspectrum-free-trial) released.   

  * ## 2024
Launch of [HQStage](https://quantumsimulations.de/solutions) - the quantum simulation toolkit from HQS with a wide range of software modules for the entire simulation process and innovative workflows.
  * ## 2023
[Qoqo for Braket](https://github.com/HQSquantumsimulations/qoqo-for-braket#_blank) is launched and further ready-to-use Software Applications. Explore our new [Solutions for Quantum Simulation](https://quantumsimulations.de/solutions).   
40 employees. See our current [team](https://quantumsimulations.de/unser-team)
  * ## 2022
[**HQS Noise App**](https://quantumsimulations.de/hqsnoiseapp) is launched.
  * ## 2021
qoqo, the quantum circuit representation library, is released.  
30 employees
  * ## 2020
First Cloud Offering.  
20 employees
  * ## 2019
€2,3 Million Seed Financing Round  
14 employees
  * ## 2018
First major public release: **ProjectQ** **port to Cirq.**   
9 emloyees
  * ## 2017
Founded by [four physicists](https://quantumsimulations.de/unser-team) with a deep background in theoretical quantum computing.


Item 1 of 10
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5f34fa00fe2696063683642a/6c8d836a-c8f0-4544-8195-227ff7f4bb26/Kohn.jpg)
## Get in touch with us!
**Elevate Your Experience with HQS: Ready to streamline your lab workflow and enhance research efficiency?**

[ Career at HQS ](https://quantumsimulations.de/jobs)

About HQS

We develop software solutions that accelerate innovation in science and industry.

HQS provides software for material scientists in the chemical industry and academia that incorporates sophisticated quantum-level models of the properties of molecules and materials, giving researchers the deeper insights they need to identify the perfect solution.

Learn more about our Solutions

Our Mission: Powering Tomorrow's Solutions

Our mission is to provide software that revolutionizes research to accelerate and enable breakthrough developments in various industries.

Our Vision: Industry's Quantum Revolution

Our vision is to establish quantum mechanical applications in industry and to realize optimized application-oriented quantum computing.

HQS Roadmap

Long term expectations in quantum computing

HQS is ideally positioned to find the first valuable use cases for quantum computers

2025

Focus on academic NMR problems

First quantum computer applications with 50 qubits in academia

2026

Specialized NMR problems in industry are addressed

Initial quantum advantage for the pharma sector

2027

Expansion to medical research and applications beyond NMR

Industry-specific problems benefit from quantum computing

2028

First use cases in med-tech diagnostics

Quantum computers provide advantages in new fields

2029

Quantum machine learning (QML) is used in diagnostics

Advanced quantum solutions adopted in med-tech

Our Story and the Minds Behind HQS

Quantum technology harbors enormous potential for industry, especially in materials development. However, in the current NISQ era, fully tapping into this potential remains a challenge. But four physicists from Karlsruher Institute of Technology (KIT) saw an opportunity to convert this potential. Thus, HQS was born.

Our grown team of 40+ experts, mainly in physics, chemistry, and computing, has turned quantum potential into practical software solutions for industry and science. We're making quantum accessible for breakthroughs.

See our current Team

Timeline

  • HQSpectrum Release

    HQS launched the full version of HQSpectrum. Read more

  • 2025

    EIC Transition grant awarded for HQS-NextNMR to advance next‑gen NMR prediction and analysis toward personalized medicine.

    HQSpectrum Trial released.

  • 2024

    Launch of HQStage - the quantum simulation toolkit from HQS with a wide range of software modules for the entire simulation process and innovative workflows.

  • 2023

    Qoqo for Braket is launched and further ready-to-use Software Applications. Explore our new Solutions for Quantum Simulation.
    40 employees. See our current team

  • 2022

    HQS Noise App is launched.

  • 2021

    qoqo, the quantum circuit representation library, is released.
    30 employees

  • 2020

    First Cloud Offering.
    20 employees

  • 2019

    €2,3 Million Seed Financing Round
    14 employees

  • 2018

    First major public release: ProjectQ port to Cirq.
    9 emloyees

  • 2017

    Founded by four physicists with a deep background in theoretical quantum computing.
